query:
UPDATE translations SET 
  en = 'View All Facilitators',
  zh = '查看所有顾问',
  fr = 'Voir tous les facilitateurs',
  ja = 'すべてのファシリテーターを見る'
WHERE `key` = 'experts.viewall';
